name: Mercenary / Sellsword
description: Fights for coin, not causes. Professional, pragmatic, and exactly as loyal as the contract specifies. Good ones are expensive. Cheap ones are dangerous.
dialogue_hooks: sizing you up professionally — not threatening, just assessing
looking for work or a traveling companion for safety
warning about trouble on the road ahead — professionally speaking
telling a story about a job that went wrong
voice_patterns: clipped professional — speaks in tactical shorthand
war-weary veteran — seen too much, drinks to forget
cocky young blade — thinks they're invincible
quiet old soldier — lets the scars do the talking

schedule.evening: drinking at tavern, assessing potential employers
schedule.night: light sleep — always ready to move
